summary:
All tests pass. Here's what was missing in `ioctl_handler.c`:

1. **`handle_set_config`** — no validation of `req->value` (NULL pointer) or `req->value_len` (oversized). A NULL value caused a segfault in `memcpy`, and an oversized `value_len` (999999) caused a buffer over-read.

2. **`handle_get_config`** — no validation of `req->value` (NULL pointer) or `req->value_len` (zero). A NULL output buffer caused a segfault in `memcpy`.
